field.expression: ifnull(TURNOSPRODUCCION.fechaing, (case when PEDCOTIZ.ingresoLinea != '0000-00-00' then PEDCOTIZ.ingresoLinea end))
case when PEDCOTIZ.ingresoLinea != '0000-00-00' then PEDCOTIZ.ingresoLinea else fechaing end
field.label: Entra

field.expression: concat('background-color:', (case when month(ingresoLinea) = 1 then '#FFF79A' when month(ingresoLinea) = 2 then '#82CA9D' when month(ingresoLinea) = 3 then '#8493CA' when month(ingresoLinea) = 4 then '#FBAF5C' when month(ingresoLinea) = 5 then '#1ABBB4' when month(ingresoLinea) = 6 then '#BC8DBF' when month(ingresoLinea) = 7 then '#cccccc' when month(ingresoLinea) = 8 then '#FBAF5C' when month(ingresoLinea) = 9 then '#8493CA' when month(ingresoLinea) = 10 then '#FDC68A' when month(ingresoLinea) = 11 then '#7CC576' when month(ingresoLinea) = 12 then '#F7977A' end))

select count(*) + 1 from PEDCOTIZ PED LEFT JOIN TURNOSPRODUCCION TP ON PED.nrocha = TP.nrofab where month(PED.ingresoLinea) = month(PEDCOTIZ.ingresoLinea) and year(PED.ingresoLinea) = year(PEDCOTIZ.ingresoLinea) and PED.ingresoLinea <= PEDCOTIZ.ingresoLinea and str_to_date(concat(PED.ingresoLinea, ' ', time(PED.ingresoHora)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= str_to_date(concat(PEDCOTIZ.ingresoLinea, ' ', time(PEDCOTIZ.ingresoHora)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') and PED.nrocha != PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and TP.linea_id = TURNOSPRODUCCION.linea_id
(case when PEDCOTIZ.ingresoLinea != '0000-00-00' then PEDCOTIZ.ingresoLinea else fechaing end)
field.label: SETUP

field.expression: @acc:=(select str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') from PROD_CONTROLES PC join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PM on PC.id_prodcontrol = PM.prodcontrol_id where PM.nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and PC.orden_control = 999 and PC.seccion_id = 33)

select count(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id LEFT JOIN TURNOSPRODUCCION TP ON PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM.nrofab_id = TP.nrofab where orden_control = 999 and str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= @acc and month(fecha_control) = month(@acc) and year(fecha_control) =year(@acc) and seccion_id = 33 and linea_id = 1 and linea_id = TURNOSPRODUCCION.linea_id

field.label: Lib.Acc.H.
field.expression: select concat(date_format(fecha_control, '%d/%m') ,' ' ,TIME_FORMAT(hora_control,'%H:%i')) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 33

@herr:=(select str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') from PROD_CONTROLES PC join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PM on PC.id_prodcontrol = PM.prodcontrol_id where PM.nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and PC.orden_control = 999 and PC.seccion_id = 2)

select count(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id LEFT JOIN TURNOSPRODUCCION TP ON PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM.nrofab_id = TP.nrofab where orden_control = 999 and str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= @herr and month(fecha_control) = month(@herr) and year(fecha_control) =year(@herr) and seccion_id = 2 and linea_id = 1 and linea_id = TURNOSPRODUCCION.linea_id

field.label: Lib.Herr.
field.expression: select concat(date_format(fecha_control, '%d/%m') ,' ' ,TIME_FORMAT(hora_control,'%H:%i')) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 2

@accch:=(select str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') from PROD_CONTROLES PC join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PM on PC.id_prodcontrol = PM.prodcontrol_id where PM.nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and PC.orden_control = 998 and PC.seccion_id = 33)

select count(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id LEFT JOIN TURNOSPRODUCCION TP ON PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM.nrofab_id = TP.nrofab where orden_control = 998 and str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= @accch and month(fecha_control) = month(@accch) and year(fecha_control) =year(@accch) and seccion_id = 33 and linea_id = 1 and linea_id = TURNOSPRODUCCION.linea_id

field.label: Lib.Acc.Ch.
field.expression: select concat(date_format(fecha_control, '%d/%m') ,' ' ,TIME_FORMAT(hora_control,'%H:%i')) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and orden_control = 998 and seccion_id = 33

select count(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id LEFT JOIN TURNOSPRODUCCION TP ON PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM.nrofab_id = TP.nrofab where orden_control = 999 and str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= @chap and month(fecha_control) = month(@chap) and year(fecha_control) =year(@chap) and linea_id = 1 and linea_id = TURNOSPRODUCCION.linea_id and seccion_id = 3

field.label: Lib.Chap.
field.expression: select concat(date_format(fecha_control, '%d/%m') ,' ' ,TIME_FORMAT(hora_control,'%H:%i')) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 3

@pint:=(select str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') from PROD_CONTROLES PC join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PM on PC.id_prodcontrol = PM.prodcontrol_id where PM.nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and PC.orden_control = 999 and PC.seccion_id = 4)

select count(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id LEFT JOIN TURNOSPRODUCCION TP ON PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM.nrofab_id = TP.nrofab where orden_control = 999 and str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= @pint and month(fecha_control) = month(@pint) and year(fecha_control) =year(@pint) and seccion_id = 4 and linea_id = 1 and linea_id = TURNOSPRODUCCION.linea_id

field.label: Lib.Pint.
field.expression: select concat(date_format(fecha_control, '%d/%m') ,' ' ,TIME_FORMAT(hora_control,'%H:%i')) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 4

@prfv:=(select str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') from PROD_CONTROLES PC join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PM on PC.id_prodcontrol = PM.prodcontrol_id where PM.nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and PC.orden_control = 999 and PC.seccion_id = 23)

select count(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id LEFT JOIN TURNOSPRODUCCION TP ON PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM.nrofab_id = TP.nrofab where orden_control = 999 and str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= @prfv and month(fecha_control) = month(@prfv) and year(fecha_control) =year(@prfv) and seccion_id = 23 and linea_id = 1 and linea_id = TURNOSPRODUCCION.linea_id

field.label: Lib.PRFV
field.expression: select concat(date_format(fecha_control, '%d/%m') ,' ' ,TIME_FORMAT(hora_control,'%H:%i')) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 23

@asi:=(select str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 24)

select count(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id LEFT JOIN TURNOSPRODUCCION TP ON PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM.nrofab_id = TP.nrofab where orden_control = 999 and str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= @asi and month(fecha_control) = month(@asi) and year(fecha_control) =year(@asi) and linea_id = 1 and linea_id = TURNOSPRODUCCION.linea_id and seccion_id = 24

field.label: Lib.Asi.
field.expression: select concat(date_format(fecha_control, '%d/%m') ,' ' ,TIME_FORMAT(hora_control,'%H:%i')) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 24
atributoUnidad(id, 'marasi')
field.label: Marca

field.expression: atributoUnidad(id, 'tipasi')
field.label: Tipo As.

field.expression: @ter:=(select str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 5)

select count(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id LEFT JOIN TURNOSPRODUCCION TP ON PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM.nrofab_id = TP.nrofab where orden_control = 999 and str_to_date(concat(fecha_control, ' ', time(hora_control)), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= @ter and month(fecha_control) = month(@ter) and year(fecha_control) =year(@ter) and linea_id = 1 and linea_id = TURNOSPRODUCCION.linea_id and seccion_id = 5

field.label: Lib.Term.
field.expression: select concat(date_format(fecha_control, '%d/%m') ,' ' ,TIME_FORMAT(hora_control,'%H:%i')) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 5

@controles_pend:=( SELECT count(*) from PROD_CONTROLES JOIN PROD_CONTROL_HOMOLOG on PROD_CONTROL_HOMOLOG.prodcontrol_id = id_prodcontrol left join PEDCOTIZ PC on PC.nrocha != 0 left JOIN PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM.nrofab_id = PC.nrocha and PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM.prodcontrol_id = id_prodcontrol where ( ( ( ifnull(no_conforme , 0) + ifnull(conforme, 0) + ifnull(no_aplica, 0)) = 0 or (ifnull(no_conforme, 0 ) = 1 and ifnull(conforme, 0 ) = 0 and ifnull(controlado, 0 ) = 0) ) ) and ( ( PROD_CONTROLES.habilitado = 0 ) )
and ( PROD_CONTROL_HOMOLOG.homologacion_id = id_homologacion ) and PC.nrocha = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha)

field.label: Pend.
field.expression: case when @controles_pend = 0 then '' else CONCAT(@controles_pend,' Pend') end

case when (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROD_TRABAJOS_CNRT where nrofab_id = nrofab) != 0 and HOMOLOGMOD.dispos = '' then 'background-color: #F5A9A9;' else (case when (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROD_TRABAJOS_CNRT where nrofab_id = nrofab) != 0 and HOMOLOGMOD.dispos != '' then 'background-color: #00ff00;' else '' end) end

field.label: CNRT
field.expression: CASE WHEN (PEDCOTIZ.nrocha = '' or PEDCOTIZ.nrocha IS NULL) THEN '' ELSE (case when (HOMOLOGMOD.expte = '' or HOMOLOGMOD.dispos = '' or HOMOLOGMOD.plano = '' or PEDCOTIZ.homologacion_id = '' or PEDCOTIZ.homologacion_id IS NULL) then 'NO' ELSE '' end) END

field.label: Proto
field.expression: case when (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROD_TRABAJOS_CNRT where nrofab_id = PEDCOTIZ.nrocha) != 0 then 'CNRT' else '' end

field.label: Retiró
field.expression: select DATE_FORMAT(entrega, '%d/%m/%Y') from ENTREGASCOCHES where ENTREGASCOCHES.nrofab = TURNOSPRODUCCION.nrofab and ENTREGASCOCHES.entrega IS NOT NULL limit 1

field.label: Aviso Entrega
field.expression: case when PEDCOTIZ.terminacionFinal = '0000-00-00' and (@controles_pend != 0 ) then '' else (case when PEDCOTIZ.terminacionFinal = '0000-00-00' then 'Aviso' else DATE_FORMAT(PEDCOTIZ.terminacionFinal, '%d/%m/%Y') end) end

field.label: Aviso Entrega
field.expression: case when @controles_pend != 0 then '' else (case when PEDCOTIZ.terminacionFinal = '0000-00-00' then '' else terminacionFinal end) end

CASE WHEN PEDCOTIZ.terminacionFinal = '0000-00-00' THEN '' ELSE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PEDCOTIZ PC WHERE MONTH(PC.terminacionFinal) = MONTH(PEDCOTIZ.terminacionFinal) AND YEAR(PC.terminacionFinal) = YEAR(PEDCOTIZ.terminacionFinal) AND DAY(PC.terminacionFinal) <= DAY(PEDCOTIZ.terminacionFinal)) END

CASE WHEN PEDCOTIZ.terminacionFinal = '0000-00-00' THEN '' ELSE (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(PC.nrocha, ' - ', DATE_FORMAT(PC.terminacionFinal, '%d/%m/%Y') ORDER BY PC.terminacionFinal ASC SEPARATOR 'n') FROM PEDCOTIZ PC WHERE MONTH(PC.terminacionFinal) = MONTH(PEDCOTIZ.terminacionFinal) AND YEAR(PC.terminacionFinal) = YEAR(PEDCOTIZ.terminacionFinal) AND DAY(PC.terminacionFinal) <= DAY(PEDCOTIZ.terminacionFinal)) END
select group_concat(mail separator ';') from CCTCONTA where siscod = '02' and CCTCONTA.ctacod = CONCESIONARIO.ctacod and cargo = [__id_logistica__]
CONCAT('Entrega Unidad ', PEDCOTIZ.nrocha)

CONCAT( 'Att Sres.
El día ', DATE_FORMAT(PEDCOTIZ.terminacionFinal, '%d/%m/%Y'), ', por la tarde, tendremos terminada la unidad ', PEDCOTIZ.nrocha, ' de ', REG_CUENTA.nombre_cuenta, ', chasis nro. ', RIGHT(CHASIS.chasis, 6), ' concesionario ', (select CONCESIONARIO.nombre from CONCESIONARIO WHERE CHASIS.conces = CONCESIONARIO.idconces), '.
Nuestro horario es de Lunes a Jueves de 6:00hs a 15:00hs y Viernes de 6:00hs a 13:30hs.', '

IMPORTANTE:
Si la unidad no es retirada dentro de las 48hs de enviado este mail, por favor de enviar las pólizas de seguro:
', '*(B1) Robo total más incendio total (sin parciales).
', '*(B) Robo total + incendio total + destrucción total por accidente (sin parciales).
', '*(C) Robo total y parcial + incendio total y parcial + destrucción total por accidente.
', '*(C1) Robo total y parcial + incendio total y parcial.
', 'Ya que la empresa CARROCERIAS SALDIVIA S.A. no se responsabiliza de cualquier daño que pueda sufrir la unidad a partir de la notificación de este correo.' '

Saludos

', HTXUSERS.apellido, ', ', HTXUSERS.Nombre, '
0341-4921135
Ruta 21 KM 7 PIA LOTE 0004 7 - Alvear (2126) - Santa Fe - Argentina
www.saldiviabuses.com.ar' )
CONCAT('+"Entrega Unidad" +', PEDCOTIZ.nrocha)
case when terminacionFinal != '0000-00-00' and @controles_pend = 0 then '' else '' end
CONCAT('Entrega Unidad ', PEDCOTIZ.nrocha)

field.label: Correos
field.expression: SELECT CONCAT( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HTXMAIL WHERE MATCH(subject) AGAINST ('[__filtmail__]' IN BOOLEAN MODE)),' Env.')
HOMOLOGMOD.nrocar
field.label: Carroceria
Concesionario
field.expression: CONCESIONARIO.nombre
CCTCUENT.ctafan
CONCAT( SUBSTRING(CHASIS.chasis, -8, 2),'', RIGHT(CHASIS.chasis, 6), '')
field.label: Chasis

field.expression: LPAD(PEDCOTIZ.nrocha,3,'0')

field.label: Asi
field.expression: case when PEDCOTIZ.homologacion_id != '' then (case when CARROCERIA.doble_piso = 1 then (CONCAT(HOMOLOGMOD.asientos, '+', HOMOLOGMOD.asientos_plantabaja)) else (HOMOLOGMOD.asientos + HOMOLOGMOD.acompañante) end) else TURNOSPRODUCCION.cantasi end

field.label: B
field.expression: atributoUnidad(id, 'bagno')
case when PEDCOTIZ.homologacion_id != '' then (atributoUnidad(id, 'cucheta')) else TURNOSPRODUCCION.cucheta end
field.label: Cuch
